result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, ready to capture that important proposal, meeting recap, or project brief — and then the cursor blinks. And blinks. The hardest part of writing has never been the writing itself; it's the starting. After hearing from so many of you that the blank page was the single biggest drag on your day, we knew we had to do something about it. Today, we're thrilled to introduce **Smart Drafts**.

Smart Drafts turns that empty canvas into a running start. Give your document a title, click *Generate Outline*, and within seconds you'll see a thoughtful, structured starting point — informed by your title and the recent context of your workspace, so the suggestions actually fit the work you're already doing. Whether it's a launch plan, a one-on-one agenda, or a customer update, you'll get a scaffold you can accept as-is, reshape, or toss entirely. It's not here to write for you; it's here to get you past the hardest sentence of any document: the first one.

This is just the beginning of where we're taking Smart Drafts. Next up, we're working on **custom voice training** — so the outlines (and eventually the prose) you generate will sound like *you* and your team, not like a generic assistant. We can't wait to share it. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a try on your next document and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for building alongside us.

# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, ready to capture that important proposal, meeting recap, or project brief — and then the cursor blinks. And blinks. The hardest part of writing has never been the writing itself; it's the starting. After hearing from so many of you that the blank page was the single biggest drag on your day, we knew we had to do something about it. Today, we're thrilled to introduce **Smart Drafts**.

Smart Drafts turns that empty canvas into a running start. Give your document a title, click *Generate Outline*, and within seconds you'll see a thoughtful, structured starting point — informed by your title and the recent context of your workspace, so the suggestions actually fit the work you're already doing. Whether it's a launch plan, a one-on-one agenda, or a customer update, you'll get a scaffold you can accept as-is, reshape, or toss entirely. It's not here to write for you; it's here to get you past the hardest sentence of any document: the first one.

This is just the beginning of where we're taking Smart Drafts. Next up, we're working on **custom voice training** — so the outlines (and eventually the prose) you generate will sound like *you* and your team, not like a generic assistant. We can't wait to share it. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a try on your next document and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for building alongside us.
